{{CargoRelic
|name=Good-doer
|class_id=20471
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The Good-doer certificate is a way to thank the kind-hearted ones, also, it encourages everybody to do good. Every small action of kindness may touch people's hearts.
|fame=29
|art=17
|fth=14
|civ=16
|tech=14
|ss1=Per 100 Badges gained, Snail ATK +3<br>Badges Gained: 2000/2000
|ss2=Per 100 Badges gained, Snail ATK +4<br>Badges Gained: 2000/2000
|ss3=Per 100 Badges gained, Snail ATK +5<br>Badges Gained: 2000/2000
|ss4=Per 100 Badges gained, Snail ATK +5<br>Badges Gained: 2000/2000
|ss7=Per 100 Badges gained, Snail ATK +5<br>Badges Gained: 2000/2000<br> (Awakened)
}}
